question: Will Lionel Messi play in the 2026 World Cup?
textDescription: This market will resolve positively if Lionel Messi plays in at least one match of the 2026 World Cup. This market will not resolve positively if Lionel Messi is merely selected as part of Argentina's squad or stays as a substitute for the entirety of the tournament. This market is not conditional on Argentina qualifying for the 2026 World Cup.
newsShortReason: Messi's recent statements and Argentina's squad inclusion suggest strong likelihood of participation.
newsKeyEvidence: Messi named in Argentina's preliminary 55-man World Cup squad. | Messi's statement expressing desire to play in 2026 World Cup. | Inter Miami confirms Messi's minor hamstring issue not serious. | Argentina manager Scaloni optimistic about Messi's participation. | Messi's recent performance with Inter Miami indicates good form.
